title: taraxacum opaciforme
intro: Taraxacum opaciforme, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as aiding in digestion, reducing fever, and supporting the immune system. Taraxacum opaciforme can be prepared as herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and has been used to make salves and creams for topical application.
